title: Extra Long Days
description: Extends the length of the minecraft days, from 20 Minutes (10m day, 10m night) to 2 Hours (60m day, 60m night)
body:
Extends the length of a Minecraft day, from 20 Minutes to 2 Hours, by very simply slowing down the daylight cycle to 1/6th speed.

This is a datapack, and thus entirely server-side and not needed on the client unless you are playing singleplayer

``` ```

Compatibility
-
There should be no major compatibility issues

``` ```

Removal
-
To remove the datapack from your world or server, run the following two commands before removing the pack from your datapacks folder:

`/gamerule doDaylightCycle true`

`/scoreboard objectives remove time_since_rest`
